name: Dark Prospect
short_description: Dark Prospect is an asymmetrical FPSvsRTS multiplayer game. FPS players must survive by gathering resources, building defenses and fighting against a player or AI who summons, commands, upgrades monsters and casts spells from an RTS perspective.
detailed_description:
Wishlist


About the Game

The gates to hell have been opened and a flood of monsters arises, which are commanded by a powerful being, the overlord

Play as soldier (FPS)

It is up to you brave soldiers to protect the only weapon that can close the portals and save humanity - the Plasma Cannon.


  • Build a defense

  • Gather resources
  • Craft weapons and gadgets
  • Prepare for battle against the overlord (either controlled by player or an AI).

Play as Overlord (RTS):

These insignificant soldiers are trying to stop you, what a foolish undertaking.


  • Your creatures all have special abilities
  • Cast powerful spells
  • The human world grants you souls that you can use to make your monsters even stronger
  • Control the action from the RTS perspective

Key Features

  • FPS: Gather resources, build a base, build weapons and gadgets, survive the attacks and destroy the RTS portals
  • RTS: Build monsters, assemble squads, cast spells, extend the monsters abilitys, destroy the soldiers base
  • 5 different maps with unique settings
  • RTS can either be controlled by a player or an AI (Different AI difficulties)
  • FPS team can be filled with bots
  • Custom games with a lot of settings for FPS and RTS
  • Host or join a game via Steam with upto 32 players
  • Ingame communication: Voice chat / quick chat / chat

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
